case_title: IPPOLITO, DOMENIC VS DONNELLY, PATRICK DBA BUG AND HARE REPAIR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY IPPOLITO, DOMENIC AS TO DEFENDANT DONNELLY, PATRICK DBA BUG AND HARE REPAIR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 26640, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DEFT DONNELLY, PATRICK RETURNED UNDELIVERED. WRONG ADDRESS.
CORRESPONDANCE FROM PIERCE & WAGNER FILED. PLTF NEEDS TO SUBMIT ORIGINAL SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IPPOLITO, DOMENIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DONNELLY, PATRICK DBA BUG AND HARE REPAIR $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT DONNELLY, PATRICK DBA BUG AND HARE REPAIR
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT DONNELLY, PATRICK DBA BUG AND HARE REPAIR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DONNELLY, PATRICK DBA BUG AND HARE REPAIR
CORRESPONDACE FROM JACQUELINE M. PIERCE, PIERCE & WAGNER STATING PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IPPOLITO, DOMENIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DONNELLY, PATRICK DBA BUG AND HARE REPAIR $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00, PURSUANT TO CCP 116.795, THE APPEAL IS DISMISSED DUE TO FAILURE TO APPEAR AND SMALL CLAIMS JUDGM. IS RESTORED AS IF NO APPEAL HAD BEEN FILED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
